page: Microsoft Azure E2nds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Endv6 server family. Powered by dedicated Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance is configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server type features 118 GB of local storage and is premium storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance external disk options. Additionally, the E2nds_v6 is designated as network-optimized, providing enhanced networking throughput to support data-intensive transfers without dedicated GPU acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E2nds_v6 offers a high density of memory relative to its compute footprint, making it a viable option for workloads requiring significant RAM without the expense of additional CPU cores. It is suited for small-scale databases, memory-cached applications, network-optimized tasks, and lightweight enterprise workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E2nds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Endv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor with dedicated Intel processors. This instance features 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It includes 118 GB of local storage, supports premium storage configurations, and is optimized for network-heavy operations. Lacking a dedicated GPU, the server relies entirely on its CPU architecture for processing. The E2nds_v6 provides a resource-dense profile that is qualitatively cost-effective for memory-bound tasks that do not require high compute scaling. It is suited for small-scale databases, in-memory caching, network-intensive applications, and general enterprise workloads requiring a balanced storage and memory footprint.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E2nds_v6 is a network-optimized virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 16 GB of RAM, and 118 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive and database workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E2nds_v6 is an x86_64 VM with 2 dedicated vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 118 GB local storage, optimized for network and memory workloads.
tagline: A network-optimized virtual machine featuring a high memory-to-core ratio and local storage for memory-intensive and database workloads.
bullet_points: 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by Intel processors
16.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
118 GB of local storage with premium storage capability
Network-optimized architecture for enhanced data transfer
Suited for small-scale databases and in-memory caching
